## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content production, performance metrics, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Mt8buZ7jxoxjL5g_yP968dkBeFNx6iSy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track with 8 articles scheduled this week, including latest podcast](https://fathom.video/share/Mt8buZ7jxoxjL5g_yP968dkBeFNx6iSy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Website migration to WordPress planned in \~2 weeks; technical audit needed post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/Mt8buZ7jxoxjL5g_yP968dkBeFNx6iSy?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [SEO performance stable; new content gaining impressions, refreshed content improving rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Mt8buZ7jxoxjL5g_yP968dkBeFNx6iSy?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic trending positively; potential focus area for future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Mt8buZ7jxoxjL5g_yP968dkBeFNx6iSy?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Team Updates

### Content Production
